form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 0.8 lengths second over 390m this track in 22.14. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last start when a 2 length fourth (22.22) at this track. Previous form sound including a win three back at Healesville. Shapes well here on best and gets chance to atone.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Bendigo over 425m. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Bendigo over 425m. Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth over 390m at Warrnambool, beaten 7 lengths (22.53) behind Blessed Rain in a Free For All on April 16. Prepared to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth over 390m at Warrnambool, beaten 7 lengths (22.53) behind Blessed Rain in a Free For All on April 16. Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Mix 3/4 on April 14 over 410m at Horsham behind Paw Palmer, beaten 5.5 lengths (23.35). Holds top-three claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fourth in a Mix 3/4 on April 14 over 410m at Horsham behind Paw Palmer, beaten 5.5 lengths (23.35). Holds top-three claims.

form.formComment: Hit the frame last time at Ballarat but the start prior was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by 4 lengths in a Grade 4/5 at Warrnambool and clocking an outstanding 25.23 for the 450m trip. Can measure up on top win two back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame last time at Ballarat but the start prior was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by 4 lengths in a Grade 4/5 at Warrnambool and clocking an outstanding 25.23 for the 450m trip. Can measure up on top win two back.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.59) at Ballarat in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 4 lengths. Strong record off the draw with three wins and two minors from seven starts. Looks one of the chances.

formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (22.59) at Ballarat in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 4 lengths. Strong record off the draw with three wins and two minors from seven starts. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 390m at Warrnambool. Can't make much of a case this time.
